top_signals.title: Ukraine has already won the war against Russia, Finnish president tells CNBC
top_signals.summary: Ukraine needs NATO, but NATO needs Ukraine as much as the other way around, the Finnish President told CNBC on Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Rises as Latest Ship Attacks Highlight Hormuz Crossing Risks
top_signals.summary: Oil nudged higher following attacks on shipping in and around the Strait of Hormuz, pointing to continued risks to vessels in the critical waterway.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: As prices fall, crack spread signals a split in oil markets
top_signals.summary:
The benchmark diesel price used for most fuel surcharges fell for the 12th time 13 weeks.

top_signals.title: Japan's SBI Holdings takes stake in US crypto exchange EDX Markets
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: CY Shipping, BigLift Shipping Christen First of Four Heavy Transport Vessels
top_signals.summary: CY Shipping and BigLift Shipping have officially christened CY Frontier, the first of four new BC-Class Heavy Transport Vessels (HTVs). The ceremony marks a milestone in the expansion of the companies' joint Heavy Transport fleet.The vessel was christened by Jenny Jung, who served as its godmother.

top_signals.title: Analysts see more upside for SpaceX as post-IPO research begins
Agility has chance to Lead Valley rivals home
top_signals.summary: ONLY three race meetings of the Hong Kong season remain, and Happy Valley hosts a fiendishly difficult nine-race card on Wednesday which features many gallopers looking for their elusive first win of the season before the summer break. With the weather remaining unpredictable, heavy rain and thunderstorms are forecast to hit the territory once again [...]

top_signals.title: Beauty and Robot can put on a show at the Valley
top_signals.summary: WITH the World Cup taking centre stage in the sporting world at present, the Hong Kong Jockey Club have framed a unique eight-runner race at Happy Valley, symbolising the eight remaining nations who have reached the quarter finals of the tournament. Sporting the country’s national colours, the eight contenders will line-up in the aptly named [...]
